title: Identify Lobster JSON path limitation + commit datetime fixes
content: Fixed all datetime.utcnow() deprecation warnings (replaced with datetime.now(UTC)). Discovered Lobster limitation: no support for $step.json.field nested access in workflow commands - only $step.json (entire object), $step.stdout, $step.approved/skipped supported. Workflow needs refactor to use state file pattern: scripts write to MEMORY_PATH/run/state.json, subsequent steps read from known paths. This is a Lobster core limitation, not a bug in our workflow design.

title: Fix Lobster workflow variable expansion and conditions
content: Fixed two critical Lobster workflow issues: (1) env: variable assignments don't expand LOBSTER_ARG_* references - must use them directly in run: commands. Removed env: section and replaced all $VAULT_PATH/$VAULT_NAME/$MEMORY_PATH with direct $LOBSTER_ARG_* references. (2) Lobster's when: clause only supports $step.approved|$step.skipped, not arbitrary JSON paths like $step.json.field. Removed early-exit conditional logic - downstream scripts handle empty buffers gracefully.
